overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a robed character exploring a gothic castle interior. The character walks through a dimly lit corridor with green stained glass windows, enters a grand hall featuring a sweeping staircase and classical paintings, then returns to the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic corridor with vaulted ceiling and stained glass windows

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the stone corridor toward the distant archway

entered.detail: arched windows with teal-colored glass set in the vaulted ceiling
high arched stone ceiling with ribbed gothic architecture
ornate wall-mounted lanterns casting warm yellow light
decorative wrought iron railings lining the corridor sides

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dimly lit gothic corridor with teal stained glass windows in the vaulted ceiling. Warm lantern light illuminates the stone walls and ornate metal railings as the character moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with double staircase and classical artwork

events.description: character passes through archway from narrow corridor into spacious grand hall with high ceilings
character turns right to circle around the grand staircase and examine the room
character turns toward the exit archway to leave the grand hall

agents.ego_description: walking around the grand hall, examining the staircase, large paintings, and architectural details

entered.detail: sweeping stone staircase with multiple levels and ornate railings
large framed painting depicting figures in classical style
tall statue standing in an arched niche
multi-armed candle holder with lit candles on the staircase
large domed skylight with metal framework visible above

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vast grand hall featuring a sweeping staircase, classical paintings, and a glass domed ceiling. The space is furnished with velvet seating and lit by ornate candelabras. The character explores the room, circling the staircase to view the architectural details before heading back toward the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic corridor with vaulted ceiling and stained glass windows

events.description: character exits the grand hall and re-enters the narrow corridor

agents.ego_description: walking back through the stone corridor away from the grand hall

entered.detail: arched windows with teal-colored glass set in the vaulted ceiling
ornate wall-mounted lanterns casting warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: The character returns to the narrow gothic corridor, leaving the grand hall behind. The teal stained glass windows and warm wall lanterns reappear as the character walks steadily back through the stone passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that leads from a claustrophobic gothic corridor into a sprawling grand hall before returning to the narrow passage. It begins by following a robed character through a dimly lit stone corridor, where warm lantern light contrasts with the teal glow of stained glass windows in the vaulted ceiling. As the character moves forward, the space suddenly expands into a vast hall featuring a sweeping staircase, velvet seating, and a glass domed ceiling illuminated by ornate candelabras. The camera circles the architectural details and classical paintings of the room before turning back toward the exit. The scene then shifts back into the confines of the gothic corridor, with the teal windows and stone walls reappearing as the character walks steadily away from the hall.
